name: Crown Jewel Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Jello by mixing each flavor with 1 cup hot water and 1/2 cup cold water. Pour each mixture into an 8-inch square cake pan and refrigerate until firm.
2. Line a spring form pan with Lady Fingers.
3. In a saucepan, mix the pineapple juice, sugar, and Lemon Jello. Stir until boiling point is reached, then let it set in the refrigerator until it thickens to syrup consistency.
4. Beat the heavy cream until firm.
5. Fold the lemon mixture into the whipped cream.
6. Cut the Jello (in the 8-inch pans) into 1/2-inch squares and fold them into the whipped cream mixture.
7. Pour the contents into the spring form pan and refrigerate for 6 hours.
